mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_monthly_summary ( employee_id, summary_month, expected_attendance_days, actual_attendance_days, late_count, early_leave_count, absence_count, leave_days, total_work_hours, calculated_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{summaryMonth}, #{expectedAttendanceDays}, #{actualAttendanceDays}, #{lateCount}, #{earlyLeaveCount}, #{absenceCount}, #{leaveDays}, #{totalWorkHours}, #{calculatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expected_attendance_days = VALUES(expected_attendance_days), actual_attendance_days = VALUES(actual_attendance_days), late_count = VALUES(late_count), early_leave_count = VALUES(early_leave_count), absence_count = VALUES(absence_count), leave_days = VALUES(leave_days), total_work_hours = VALUES(total_work_hours), calculated_at = VALUES(calculated_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, summary_month, expected_attendance_days, actual_attendance_days, late_count, early_leave_count, absence_count, leave_days, total_work_hours, calculated_at, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_monthly_summary WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND summary_month = #{summaryMonth}
